raspberry-honey-shmear.name: Raspberry-honey Shmear
instructions: Place cream cheese in a bowl and microwave at 30% power in 10 second intervals until slightly soft but not warm, approximately 20 to 30 seconds.
Place raspberries and honey over top and lightly mash raspberries with a fork. Stir mixture until evenly combined.

recipe-for-galician-sardine-empanada-com.name: Recipe For Galician Sardine Empanada
recipe-for-galician-sardine-empanada-com.original_name: Receta de empanada gallega de sardinas

ingredients.item: ½ kg wheat flour ((250 g leudant and 250 g regular))
4 latas de sardinas (en aceite o al natural)

instructions: It incorporates wheat flour into a bowl, opens up a space at the centre and forms a volcano.
Esparce la sal por alrededor de la harina y vierte en el centro la leche, el aceite y el huevo.
With the help of your hands, mix very well until a smooth and homogenous mass forms. He mustn't stick his hands or his bowl.
If you notice that you need more fluids or flour, add them.
Haz de tu masa una bola y deja levar por 10 minutos.
Mientras, pela la cebolla y limpia los pimientos. Corta ambos en cuadritos o en julianas. Filetea los dientes de ajo.
Abre las latas de sardina, escurre y con un tenedor retira las espinas de la sardina.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and sock garlic and onion for 2 minutes.
Incorporates the pepper, blend and kitchen for another two minutes.
Add sardines, salt and pepper to best taste paprika. Mix and finish cooking for 4 minutes. Kill and let cool.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Take the dough and stretch very well, leaving 1 cm thick. Take two discs a little bigger from your plate.
Engrasa la bandeja, coloca el primer disco, presiona en el fondo y en las paredes hasta que quede bien cubierta.
Agrega el relleno en el centro y esparce la sardina muy bien. Tapa con el otro disco y presiona en los bordes.
Do some opening with a fork so that the cooking will get together.
Hornea por 35 minutos o hasta que quede doradita y crujiente.
Retira del horno, deja enfriar un poco, desmolda y corta en las raciones que desees.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-pumpkin-meatballs-with-quinoa.name: Recipe For Pumpkin Meatballs With Quinoa In Coconut Sauce
recipe-for-pumpkin-meatballs-with-quinoa.original_name: Receta de albóndigas de calabaza con quinoa en salsa de coco
instructions: Chew the quinoa in abundant water until it's loose and fluffy, about 15 minutes. Let it cool.
Pocha la cebolla y la calabaza rallada.
In a bowl, add quinoa, add an egg and oatmeal and pumpkin to form a dough.
Deja que se asiente bien la masa, si se hacen la noche anterior mejor.
The meatballs are then formed and slightly frying into some oil.
Para voltearla utiliza una paleta para que no se deshaga.
When they're already fried, put them back.
In a pot add the meatballs with coconut milk and let cook for 10 minutes.
After this time you'll have your meatballs ready to enjoy.

recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-tuna-co.name: Recipe For Zucchini Stuffed With Tuna
recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-tuna-co.original_name: Receta de calabacines rellenos de atún

ingredients.item: 2 cans of tuna in water (approximately 240 g).
1/2 taza de queso rallado ((opcional, como mozzarella o parmesano).)
1/4 taza de pan rallado ((opcional para mayor textura).)

instructions: Wash them well and cut them throughout. With a spoon, remove his pulp to form a kind of canoe, leaving an edge of about 1 cm. Reserve your pulp.
Place pumpkin halves on an oven plate and bake them at 180 been 3 been for 10 minutes to soften them slightly.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat.
Soak onion and garlic till clear.
Agrega el tomate y la pulpa de los calabacines picada. Cocina por 5 minutos.
It incorporates minced tuna, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper. Mix well and cook for 3-4 more minutes.
Remove pumpkins from the oven and fill them with the tuna mixture.
Espolvorea queso rallado y/o pan rallado si lo deseas.
The pumpkins come back into the oven and purple for 10-12 minutes, or till the cheese's golden and bubbling.
Serves hot pumpkins, decorated with more fresh parsley.

red-plum-cookies-lezzet.name: Red Plum Cookies
instructions: 1. knead the butter, yogurt, lemon peel grater, powder sugar, flour, vanilla and baking powder by taking a large coarse.
2. From the olive oil;gether;gether;gether.
3. Drink to them put them from the erics you have in your home and round them with your hands.
4. Directory to oil paper-series oven tray.
5. Bake 25-30 minutes in oven heated 180 degrees.
6. After the cold u sprinkle the sugar in the car.

reverse-sear-steak.name: Reverse-sear Steak
instructions: Preheat the oven to 93°C(95°C).
Pat the steak dry with a paper towel, then generously season on all sides with salt and pepper.

Place the steak on a wire rack set on top of a baking sheet and bake for 45-60 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches about 52°C/50˚C for medium-rare. Adjust the bake time if you like your steak more rare or well-done.

Heat the canola oil in a pan over high heat until smoking. Do not use olive oil, as its smoke point is significantly lower than that of canola oil and it will smoke before reaching the desired cooking temperature.
Sear the steak for 1 minute on one side, then flip.
Add the butter, garlic, rosemary, and thyme and swirl around the pan. Transfer the garlic and herbs on top of the steak and baste the steak with the butter using a large spoon.
Baste for about 1 minute, then flip the steak with tongs and baste the other side for about 15 seconds.
Turn the steak on its side to render off any excess fat.
Enjoy!

rice-bowl-lezzet.name: Rice Bowl
instructions: 1. 1 cup of rice boiling saltwater is also boiled.
2. The meat is cooked in 1 tablespoon of olive oil, which is chopped in the form of the tomb of the chest.
3.  It is divided into equal amounts of rice to the plates.
4. The avocado is sliced in the shape of the right after being divided into two.
5.  It is reducted.
6.   vegetables prepared in the area on the eggs are laid.
7. 1 tablespoon of olive oil and lemon juice are visited.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

rice-porridge-with-dashi.name: Rice Porridge With Dashi

ingredients.prep: sliced scallions, red-skin Spanish peanuts, and crispy fried shallots (for serving; optional)

instructions: Combine shiitake and 8 cups cold water in a large saucepan. Cover and let soak at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours to rehydrate the mushrooms.

Add kombu and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and cook at a very low simmer 10 minutes. Add bonito, stir lightly, and remove from heat. Let sit until bonito sinks to the bottom of the pan, about 5 minutes. Strain and discard solids.
Do Ahead: Dashi can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Cook oil and garlic in a large, heavy pot over medium heat until garlic is light golden around the edges, about 2 minutes. Immediately add rice and stir until coated with oil and fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 3 cups dashi, increase heat to medium-high, and bring to a boil, stirring often. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue to cook, adding 1 cup water at a time as liquid is absorbed so that rice is always covered by at least 1” liquid (about 12 cups total) and stirring constantly to keep rice from sticking to the bottom of pot, until rice is tender and mixture is the consistency of loose oatmeal (rice will begin to break down and become creamy after about 30 minutes). Taste and season porridge with salt and any reserved dashi if it is too bland. Porridge will thicken as it sits—add more water or dashi to thin if needed.
Divide porridge among bowls and top with kimchi, scallions, peanuts, and shallots if desired.

rice-vermicelli-with-chicken-and-nuoc-ch.name: Rice Vermicelli With Chicken And Nuoc Cham

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced crosswise, separated into rings

ingredients.item: Fresh thai or sweet basil leaves

instructions: Prepare grill for medium heat. Season chicken with salt and grill, turning often and moving away from direct heat if needed, until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center registers 165°, 20–25 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate. Let cool slightly, then shred meat, discarding skin and bones. Set aside.

Cook shallot in oil in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until shallot is golden brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes (reserve shallot oil and use to make vinaigrettes). Using a slotted spoon, transfer shallot rings to a paper towel–lined plate and season with salt. Set aside.
Meanwhile, place noodles in a large bowl and add boiling water to cover. Let noodles soak until tender but not mushy, 5–10 minutes; drain. Rinse under cold water and drain well.

Mix chile, garlic, lime juice, fish sauce, and brown sugar in a large bowl to combine. Add noodles, turnips, radishes, half of basil, and reserved shredded chicken, and toss to combine. Top with reserved fried shallot rings and remaining basil.
Do Ahead: Shallot rings can be fried 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature. Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Store in an airtight container and chill.

rice-with-plums-argiro.name: Rice With Plums

ingredients.item: 12 dried plums (without cocoons and finely chopped)
4 flushing (of your liking or hot water)
1 red pepper (cut into very small frames)
A little yogurt drained, for serving, (optional)
12 dried plums (without cocoons and finely chopped)
4 flushing (of your liking or hot water)
1 red pepper (cut into very small frames)
A little yogurt drained, for serving, (optional)

instructions: Rinse the rice in plenty of water until the water is completely cleaned and clear. Drain it in a colander.
Heat the olive oil in a pot. We keep some finely chopped green onions leaves for the end of our recipe.
Sauté the fresh onions for 1 minute.
Pour the rice and mix to oil well and become transparent.
Add the chopped plums.
Finally, pour the hot water or broth. Salt and pepper.
Lower the heat and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Add the pepper, green onions leaves and carrot.
Boil for another 5′, until the rice bursts, drink all its liquids and have little holes on the surface.
Leave the rice covered with clean towel for 5-10 minutes.
Serve with some yogurt.

ricotta-stuffed-squash-blossoms.name: Ricotta-stuffed Squash Blossoms

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix ricotta, mozzarella, and chives; season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a piping bag or resealable plastic bag (cut tip). Pipe into squash blossoms. Place breadcrumbs in a baking dish. Lightly beat eggs in another dish. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Dip blossoms in egg, then breadcrumbs. Cook, turning once, until golden, about 4 minutes. Drain on paper towels; season with salt.

roast-beef-sliders.name: Roast Beef Sliders
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Slice buns in half vertically, leaving buns attached as a sheet. Peel off attached top sheet buns and set aside; place attached bottom sheet buns in the prepared dish. Layer roast beef and cheese across buns.
Heat oil in a small skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms; cook until soft, about 5 minutes. Spread onion mixture over beef and cheese; place top sheet buns on top.
Combine melted butter, garlic powder, adobo seasoning, and Italian seasoning; brush on tops of buns, pouring any extra over sides.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese starts to melt, about 15 minutes. Separate each bun into a sandwich using a serrated knife. Serve hot.

roast-pork-shank-teleculinaria.name: Roast Pork Shank
instructions: Take a pot to the fire with water, add the leaves of laurel and thyme, season with salt and let it boil. Wash the legs thoroughly, add them to the pot and let cook for 15 minutes.

Start the oven at 170 degrees. Peel off the onions and garlic teeth, cut the onions in buds, scrape the garlic and throw everything into a clay tray. Add the pepper paste, olive oil, white wine, a little salt and pepper and mix well.
Then add the legs, wrap them well and put them in the oven for about 1 hour and 45 minutes, turning from time to time. Remove from the oven and serve with sautéed vegetables, potatoes or rice.

roasted-beets-and-citrus-with-feta.name: Roasted Beets And Citrus With Feta

ingredients.prep: all peel and pith cut away, segments cut from between membranes
all peel and pith cut away, segments cut from between membranes

instructions: Whisk vinegar, mustard, citrus peels, and honey in small bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season vinaigrette with salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Toss beets and oil in large bowl; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Wrap each beet in foil. Place directly on oven rack; roast until tender, 60 to 70 minutes. Open foil; cool 30 minutes. Rub skins off beets; cut each into 8 wedges. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.

Place spinach in large bowl; toss with 2 tablespoons vinaigrette. Divide among plates. Add beets and citrus segments to same bowl. Add 2 tablespoons vinaigrette; toss to coat. Arrange beet mixture atop spinach; sprinkle with cheese and chives. Serve, passing any remaining vinaigrette.

roasted-brussels-sprouts-with-thyme-and-.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts With Thyme And Shallots
instructions: Pre-heat oven to 204°C. Lightly oil a rimmed baking sheet.
Place bacon in a skillet. Cook over medium heat until crisp. Drain on paper towels; crumble.
Toss Brussels sprouts with olive oil, garlic, shallots, thyme, pepper, red pepper flakes, and crumbled bacon in a bowl. Transfer to prepared baking sheet.
Slowly pour Swanson® Unsalted Chicken Broth over the Brussels sprouts.
Roast in preheated oven for 10 minutes. Gently stir sprouts. Continue roasting until sprouts are crisp tender, about 10 minutes more.
Top with grated Parmesan cheese.

roasted-carrot-soup-with-crispy-shallots.name: Roasted Carrot Soup With Crispy Shallots
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (218°C). Place the red bell pepper, 3 large shallots, ginger, and carrots on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, sprinkle with ½ tsp. ground cumin, and season with kosher salt. Toss to coat and roast until vegetables are tender and charred in spots, 35–45 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat ½ cup vegetable oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Cook the 1 thinly sliced shallot, stirring often, until deep golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain; season with flaky sea salt. Let cool until crisp; discard the oil.

Transfer the roasted vegetables to a blender. Add 4 cups low-sodium chicken broth and ½ cup heavy cream, then season with freshly ground black pepper. Blend on low until puréed, then increase speed to medium-high and blend until smooth. If the soup is too thick, thin with up to 1 cup water. Taste the soup and season with more kosher salt if needed.
Ladle the soup into bowls. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil, season with black pepper, and top with the crispy shallots.

roasted-corn-with-manchego-and-lime.name: Roasted Corn With Manchego And Lime

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Roast unhusked corn on a baking sheet, turning occasionally, until heated through and crisp-tender, about 15 minutes. Let cool. Shuck corn and cut kernels from cobs. Discard cobs.

Heat oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add corn kernels and sauté until heated through and light-golden in spots, 3-5 minutes. Add butter; stir until melted. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Transfer corn to a large wide bowl or deep platter; sprinkle jalapeño and crushed red pepper flakes over. Squeeze lime wedges over; sprinkle with cheese, chives, and lime zest.

roasted-lamb-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Roasted Lamb In The Oven
instructions: In a basin, add all the ingredients.
Mix everything together with your hands.
If you have time, let the materials stand for 30 minutes in the pelvis.
Then we put all their liquids in the clay pot.
Cover with the lid.
Bake in the preheated oven 1.5 hour at 200.4.3
If you have wood oven, put it at low temperature all night.
This unique traditional recipe of the Aegean was shared with us by Mrs Argyros from Apollo, Rhodes, and we thank her very much.
And if you pass through the Apollos of Rhodes you can taste it in the traditional and award-winning tavern Paraga.

rose-and-yogurt-panna-cotta.name: Rose And Yogurt Panna Cotta
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pistachios on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 7–9 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop. Set nuts aside.
Whisk gelatin with ¼ cup water in a small bowl to combine. Let sit 15 minutes.

Mix yogurt, rose syrup, and ½ cup cream in a medium bowl to combine. Heat sugar and remaining ¾ cup cream in a small saucepan over medium, stirring often, until mixture is hot and sugar is dissolved, about 2 minutes. Whisk in gelatin mixture, then pour into yogurt mixture and whisk to combine.

Divide panna cotta mixture among eight 4-oz. ramekins, small bowls, coffee cups, or any small vessel you’d like to use for serving. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and chill until set, at least 2 hours.
If using, scoop a spoonful of basil seeds into a small bowl; pour in water to cover. Let sit until gelatinized, about 10 minutes.
To serve, top panna cottas with basil seeds, raisins, a few blackberries, if desired, and reserved pistachios.
Do Ahead: Panna cotta (without toppings) can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

roses-herb-roasted-easter-lamb.name: Rose's Herb-roasted Easter Lamb

ingredients.item: Boneless new zealand leg of lamb

instructions: Combine 6 cloves peeled garlic, rosemary, salt, and black pepper in the bowl of a food processor; pour in melted butter with processor running until finely minced and combined. Coat top and sides of lamb with rosemary paste; set aside at room temperature for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Toss potatoes, 6 cloves unpeeled garlic, and olive oil together in a bowl. Place lamb in center of a roasting pan; arrange potatoes and garlic around lamb.
Roast in the preheated oven for 75 to 90 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 54°C (54 degrees C). Rest before slicing, 20 minutes.

rosemary-steak-bites.name: Rosemary Steak Bites

ingredients.prep: bottom 4 inches (10 cm) of leaves removed

instructions: Heat a 12-inch (5 cm) cast iron skillet over medium-high heat for at least 10 minutes.
Add the steak to a medium bowl and season with the salt and pepper, tossing to coat evenly.
Thread 2 pieces of steak onto each rosemary sprig, sliding up the stem until the steak meets the leaves. Using scissors, trim the bottom of the sprigs so each end is about ½ inch long.
Add the olive oil and garlic to the pan, stir, and let heat for about 1 minute.

Once the oil begins to smoke, add 1 tablespoon of butter and stir to distribute. Place the skewers in the pan. Sear, without moving, for about 2 minutes, until a nice brown crust forms on one side. Using tongs, carefully flip each skewer over and brown on the other side, about 2 minutes more. Once cooked to your desired doneness, remove the steak skewers from the skillet and set on a clean baking sheet to rest.
Without reducing the heat, carefully pour the wine into the skillet. Cook until reduced to ¼ cup, 5–10 minutes. Once reduced, remove the garlic from the pan and discard.
Add the sugar and remaining 4 tablespoons of butter to the red wine reduction and stir until combined, 1–2 minutes.
Garnish the steak skewers lightly with salt and pepper, then transfer to a serving platter and spoon the sauce on top.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

rye-and-pomegranate-punch.name: Rye And Pomegranate Punch
instructions: Combine rye, lemon juice, pomegranate juice, honey simple syrup, liqueur, and bitters in a punch bowl and chill until cold, about 3 hours.
Thirty minutes before serving, add ice cubes or ice ring (the punch tastes better slightly diluted).
Just before serving, add club soda and garnish with cloves. Serve over ice.
